title: Spiraling Whirlpool
description:
You happen upon a [aqua][sine]Massive Spiraling Whirlpool[/sine][/aqua]. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.

[purple][sine]Around and around... around...
....and around.... what a sight......[/sine][/purple]

What do you do?
conditions: All players must have at least one card in their deck that can be enchanted with Spiral
notes:
The [green]Heal[/green] amount from [blue]Drink[/blue] is [green]33%[/green] of the player's maximum HP (rounded down to an integer).

The [purple]Observe[/purple] option prompts the player to select a card from their deck that can accept the [purple]Spiral[/purple] enchantment. The selected card is then enchanted with [purple]Spiral[/purple].
